zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham於1402年8月15日出生在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德時，他的父親Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford24歲，母親Anne of Gloucester19歲。他於1424年10月14日與Anne Neville在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1421年登記服兵役。他於1424年被列為privy councillor。他去世於1460年7月10日在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham于1402年8月15日出生在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德时，他的父亲Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford24岁，母亲Anne of Gloucester19岁。他于1424年10月14日与Anne Neville在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1421年登记服兵役。他于1424年被列为privy councillor。他去世于1460年7月10日在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham was born on 15 August 1402, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, his father, Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford, was 24 and his mother, Anne of Gloucester, was 19. He married Anne Neville on 14 October 1424, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1421. In 1424, at the age of 22, his occupation is listed as privy councillor. He died on 10 July 1460, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham est né le 15 août 1402, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne of Gloucester, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Anne Neville le 14 octobre 1424, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1421. En 1424, à l’âge de 22 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est privy councillor. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1460, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham am 15. August 1402 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford 24 und seine Mutter Anne of Gloucester 19. Er hat am 14. Oktober 1424 in England Anne Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1421 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1424, als er 22 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als privy councillor aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. Juli 1460 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Anne Neville il 14 ottobre 1424, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1421. ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckinghamが1402年8月15日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで生まれた時，父Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Staffordは24歳，母Anne of Gloucesterは19歳であった。1424年10月14日にイギリスでAnne Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年に兵役登録をした。1424年，22歳の時，職業はprivy councillorと記録されている。彼は1460年7月10日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.campaigned in France: 미국 인디애나 주 존슨 휘트 라이버 타운시프 프랜스스
ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham(이)가 1402년 8월 15일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne of Gloucester(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1424년 10월 14일 영국에서 Anne Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1424년, 22세의 나이로 그의 직업은 privy councillor이었다. 그는 1460년 7월 10일 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1402, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne of Gloucester, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Neville em 14 de outubro de 1424, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1421. Em 1424, com 22 anos, sua profissão aparece como privy councillor. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1460, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham родился 15 августа 1402 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne of Gloucester, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Neville 14 октября 1424 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1421 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1424 году, в возрасте 22 лет, работал по профессии privy councillor. Он умер 10 июля 1460 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.15 August 1402–10 July 1460: 15 de agosto de 1402–10 de julio de 1460
es.campaigned in France: Frances, White River Township, Johnson, Indiana, Estados Unidos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham nació el 15 de agosto de 1402, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Anne of Gloucester, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Anne Neville el 14 de octubre de 1424, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1421. En 1424, a la edad de 22 años, su ocupación registrada era privy councillor. Murió el 10 de julio de 1460, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
